listings.title: EMG 81 Active White Humbucker with Solderless Wiring Electronics
listings.body: Hello! I am selling an EMG 81 humbucker that I bought brand new for a project. I've decided to go with a different pickup which is why I'm selling this one Everything included is what you would get buying brand new. Because this is a soleerless system, it's practically in mint condition (except for the battery clip wire). I had to cut it in half to get it to fit my guitar and re-solder it. Please note that in the photo where you see the heat shrink around it. Otherwise, everything else is exactly as you would expect buying brand new. I only used the pickup for a couple of months. It works and plays exactly as it should, and has no scratches or any weird artifacts. This includes literally everything you would get buying brand new, including a solderless volume and tone pot, stereo output jack, battery clip, manual, and all necessary cables for an easy installation. Please let me know if you have any questions. Thanks for looking!

listings.title: Roadrunner hard guitar case
listings.body: Hard case, scuffs and stuff but no structural damage. Grey inside.

listings.title: Various Strat parts
listings.body: Some Stratocaster parts -70’s maple neck (off a Squier Classic Vibe) Headstock is sanded down, ready for any color paint or a clear coat -bridge with tremolo arm, claw and springs(Also off a Squier CV) $100 for everything

listings.title: Ingersoll Rand Air Chisel
listings.body: I have an Ingersoll Rand Air Chisel for sale, I closed a small shop and have duplicates of air chisels. It works well with no problems, some wear on the case but nothing serious.It's earned a few scratches. Comes with a chisel, and an inlet air connector. Made in the USA. Sell for $28 final price. Cash Only Please, no Zelle or Venmo

listings.title: Portable Dishwasher works great super clean
listings.body: Selling my portable dishwasher cheap only asking 100 for it call or text me at show contact info

listings.title: Vintage 1960s Imperial Diamond Edge 857DE Folding Pocket Camp Knife
listings.body: This is a vintage Imperial folding pocket knife made in Providence, RI USA. It has a synthetic handle and stainless steel blades. Measures: 3.75" when closed.
